ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-scan the vault root to pick up newly created hidden folders. This does not re-index folders that are already enabled — it only refreshes the list below.
ast.target: 重新扫描保险库根目录以发现新创建的隐藏文件夹。这不会重新索引已启用的文件夹——它只刷新下方的列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: e.g. md, canvas, base, png, pdf
ast.target: 例如 md, canvas, base, png, pdf

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 隐藏文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 刷新文件夹列表

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 文件类型

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 允许的扩展名

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 支持

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: md, canvas, base, …

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Failed to list hidden folders. Check the developer console.
ast.target: 列出隐藏文件夹失败。请检查开发者控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 隐藏文件夹列表已刷新

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Rebuilding enabled folders with the new file-type filter…
ast.target: 正在使用新的文件类型过滤器重建已启用的文件夹…

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Allowed extensions reset to defaults. Rebuilding…
ast.target: 允许的扩展名已重置为默认值。正在重建…

ast.name: name
ast.target: 重新扫描隐藏文件夹

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select which hidden root-level folders (names starting with a dot) Obsidian should index. Toggling a folder on kicks off indexing in the background — you can close this tab and keep working while it runs. A notification updates live and disappears when the folder is fully indexed.
ast.target: 选择 Obsidian 应索引哪些隐藏的根级文件夹（名称以点开头）。切换文件夹开关将在后台启动索引——您可以关闭此选项卡并继续工作，索引会在后台运行。通知会实时更新，并在文件夹完全索引后消失。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Only folders at the vault root are listed. The Obsidian configuration folder is always excluded.
ast.target: 仅列出保险库根目录下的文件夹。Obsidian 配置文件夹始终被排除。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 正在扫描保险库根目录…

ast.name: text
ast.source: No hidden folders found at the vault root.
ast.target: 在保险库根目录未找到隐藏文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Changes are applied when you click Save — this triggers a full rebuild of every enabled folder in the background.
ast.target: 更改将在您点击“保存”时应用——这将在后台触发对所有已启用文件夹的完全重建。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Buy me a coffee to support the development of this plugin ❤️
ast.target: 请我喝杯咖啡以支持此插件的开发 ❤️
